name: Local Narratives Day Experience
description: A half-day immersion at a weaving and farming collective near Bengaluru, with a story walk, charkha workshop, community lunch and a reflection circle

name: Breezy Basavanagudi
description: A slow, observational walk through Basavanagudi, threading past temples, bungalows and streetside botany in one of Bengaluru's oldest neighbourhoods

name: Cartographies of Becoming
description: Exhibition and symposium from the Onion Project 2.0, mapping the unseen social and spatial lives of Indian cities

name: URBAN HEAT LAB by Unmapped.blr
description: A half-day workshop using games, mapping and world-building to decode urban heat stress as both a systemic issue and a lived experience in Indian cities

name: The Frugal Innovation Forum
description: A day-long forum on frugal innovation across healthcare, AI, space and architecture, with speakers from ISRO, IISc, Cambridge Frugal AI Hub, Airbus, Biome Environmental Solutions and many more

name: Ethno-Medicinal Garden Walk
description: A guided walk through the Ethno Medicinal Garden led by herbarium curator Dr. S. Noorunnisa Begum, exploring healing herbs and endangered species

name: Garden Together Club: A Terrarium Workshop Experience
description: Build a terrarium one layer at a time in a quiet, hands-on session, with a mango beverage and light bites served as you work

name: SIS X DizzyDuck - Hula Hoop Workshop
description: Learn hula hooping from scratch, on-body flow, off-body tricks and combos you can actually remember

name: Peel Good Brunch: A Mango Edition
description: Alphonso season at its peak, served as a slow four-course brunch that balances savoury, sweet, spice and brightness across every plate

name: Theatre & Art Workshop for Kids (9-14)
description: A theatre and art workshop for ages 9 to 14, exploring self-expression through movement, voice and art at NGMA

name: Make your own Laser Cut Puzzle!
description: A hands-on laser cutting workshop where you turn any image you bring into a custom jigsaw puzzle you take home

name: Karunadu Swada - Karnataka Food Festival
description: Karunadu Swada brings forgotten recipes from North Karnataka, Karavalli and Old Mysore to one table, with folk performances and summer coolers through the weekend

location.name: Jayamahal Palace Exhibition Center, Jayamahal
location.address: Jayamahal Palace Exhibition Center, Jayamahal, Bangalore

name: 403 OVERRIDE | FIREWALL X PRIYAM CHATTERJEE & RISHABH SEAL
description: Chefs Priyam Chatterjee and Rishabh Seal, from Michelin-recognised kitchens, take over 403 Forbidden with a live, evolving à la carte menu reimagining heritage through haute cuisine

name: Shreya Maste: Dance Workshop
description: Choreographer Shreya Maste leads a playful, performance driven piece at Rtribe

location.name: Rtribe - Dance and Wellness Space, Koramangala
location.address: Rtribe - Dance and Wellness Space, Koramangala, Bangalore

name: Nature’s Guardians | Stories of Protecting Our Planet | DocuDialogues screening
description: Documentary screening on the people protecting wildlife and ecosystems, followed by an open conversation on conservation and collective action

name: A Carved Narrative: Explore the Craft of Woodcut Printmaking
description: A beginner-friendly woodcut printmaking session covering carving, inking and pulling a print from scratch.

name: The Kite Runner
description: Arena Theatre Productions stages Khaled Hosseini's novel, tracing friendship, betrayal and redemption against a shifting Afghanistan

name: Ease Into It - An evening for CBD, creativity & comfort 🌿✨
description: CBD conversations by Trost, hands-on decor with Sea Salt, and matcha by Purpose in one unhurried evening of wellness, craft and good coffee

name: Pottery Workshop at Beruru
description: Shape clay, try glazing and take home what you make in a beginner pottery session pitched as equal parts craft and screen break

name: The Baker's Supper - Supper Club
description: A golden hour bread workshop exploring local grains in dough-making, with fresh bakes to taste and cool drinks to sip

name: Open Mic at CONCEPT01
description: An open mic at CONCEPT01 for musicians, producers, singers and performers to showcase their work on a proper stage

name: Rasanubhava Dance Festival 2026
description: Classical Indian dance across three traditions, from a Mohiniyattam solo with live orchestra to Bharatanatyam to a full choreographic production, tracing the journey from Rasa to Bhava

name: Natyarani Shanthala: Dance-Theatre Production
description: Shraavya Satyanarayan's solo dance theatre piece reimagines Hoysala queen Shanthala Devi through narration and movement

name: BLR Crawl Club - Women's Edition
description: A women only bar crawl through Church Street, moving across four curated stops with drinks, bites and easy conversation

name: On Melancholy Hill by Aanchal Bordoloi and Friends
description: An intimate evening of acoustic music and conversation on love, loss and the grief that lives in everyday things, with sets by songwriter Sourjyo Sinha and singer-songwriter Aanchal

name: Book Launch: Ambedkar: Sonic Imagination of Casteless Utopia
description: For Dalit History Month, Champaca hosts the launch of Yogesh Maitreya's book tracing Ambedkar's legacy through the music of the anti-caste movement across seven decades

name: Film Screening at BFF - The Cranes Are Flying
description: A screening of Mikhail Kalatozov's The Cranes Are Flying, a 1957 drama of love and separation during World War II whose cinematography by Sergei Urusevsky changed what audiences thought a camera could do

name: The Studios of Raja Ravi Varma | Talk by Ganesh V Shivaswamy
description: On the occasion of Raja Ravi Varma's birth anniversary, researcher Ganesh V Shivaswamy opens a window into the artist's studio practice, exploring the labour and process behind his finished artwork

name: Preethiyinda (with love)
description: A near wordless play about a dancer and a thief navigating love in a city where intimacy has become an act of rebellion.

name: Ladakh on a Plate: Decked Out at Lapis
description: Chef Jigmet Mingur, a monk-turned chef, presents a Trans-Himalayan dinner of slow-cooked broths, grains, and seasonal produce across courses

name: SCC SkyCinema - Hum Tum
description: Hum Tum, the romantic comedy about two people who can't quite get their timing right, screened under open skies on a rooftop with the city skyline

name: Moonlight Movies - Chak De! India
description: An open-air screening of Chak De! India, Shah Rukh Khan and an underdog women's hockey team in one of Bollywood's most rewatched sports films

name: Chaos Circuit ft. Lola Cerise (Rage Box Edition)
description: European rave export Lola Cerise headlines a 360 degree hard techno night built around a Berlin inspired audio visual rig

name: Choreography Workshop by Isha Sharma
description: A choreography session focused on learning a full routine with emphasis on flow and presence

name: Ladakh on a Plate: Decked Out at Lapis
description: Chef Jigmet Mingur, a monk-turned chef, presents a Trans-Himalayan dinner of slow-cooked broths, grains, and seasonal produce across courses

name: Bengaluru Fort Heritage Walk
description: A heritage walk uncovers Bengaluru Fort’s stories, linking Tipu Sultan’s era, wartime innovation, and the city’s evolving landscape

name: SIS X Dhurii: Belly Dance Workshop
description: A tribal fusion belly dance workshop covering body conditioning, hip fundamentals and fluid arm pathways, finishing with a short choreography that brings it all together

location.address: Dhurii Academy Of Arts, Domlur, Bangalore

name: Doubble Retro Brunch
description: The first Sunday brunch at Doubble with brunch specials, retro tunes by DJ Robby Banner,  and an afternoon built for lingering

description: Chefs Priyam Chatterjee and Rishabh Seal, from Michelin-recognised kitchens, take over 403 Forbidden with a live, evolving à la carte menu reimagining heritage through haute cuisine

name: Soju & Slurp: A Veg Korean Supper Club (Summer Edition)
description: A Korean supper club serving Kimchi three ways, pajeon, bibimbap, tteokbokki and cold soju cocktails on a slow Sunday afternoon

name: Little Folds Of Pasta - A Guided Fresh Pasta Workshop
description: Roll out fresh dough, fill it with cheesy corn and seal it into ravioli from scratch, then finish in your choice of mascarpone or spicy mango mint pesto

name: Quiz Quest Workshop and Meetup with Berty Ashley and QZ Vault
description: Berty Ashley, veteran quizzer and author of the Easy Like Sunday Morning column, leads a QZ Vault workshop on making quizzes more engaging and easier to set

name: Tasting the Landscape: Talk
description: Artist Giulia Berra unpacks her exhibit Cavallette, exploring the line between food and pest, famine and nourishment, through art made from insects and food waste

name: A Walkthrough of What India Learned to See at Raja Ravi Varma Heritage Foundation
description: Marking Raja Ravi Varma's 178th birth anniversary with a walkthrough on how print reshaped the life of images, carrying them from canvas to calendar to collective memory

name: Little Folds Of Pasta - A Guided Fresh Pasta Workshop
description: Roll out fresh dough, fill it with cheesy corn and seal it into ravioli from scratch, then finish in your choice of mascarpone or spicy mango mint pesto

name: Meet Brachio - An Interactive Story Telling Session
description: A storytelling session of the book Brachio brought to life with props and dramatic narration, followed by a drawing activity and book signing with the author

name: Music, Magic, Comedy, House Party
description: "Treble Puns debut their comedy-music album at a Bangalore house show, alongside magic by Vaibhav and standup by Comicstaan's Shunky Chugani

name: A Mother’s Day Baking Experience
description: A Mother's Day baking session at Jus'Trufs for parents and children, or any two people who want a morning of making something sweet together. Chocolate truffle bento cake and vanilla cupcakes, all packed to take home
